scripts.demo:http:testnet: NETWORK_MODE=testnet concurrently "node x402/server-inprocess.js" "npm run dev --prefix demo/http"
scripts.demo:http:mainnet: NETWORK_MODE=mainnet concurrently "node x402/server.js" "npm run dev --prefix demo/http"
scripts.demo:mcp:testnet: NETWORK_MODE=testnet npm run build --prefix demo/mcp && NETWORK_MODE=testnet concurrently "node x402/server-inprocess.js" "node demo/mcp/dashboard.js"
scripts.demo:mcp:mainnet: NETWORK_MODE=mainnet npm run build --prefix demo/mcp && NETWORK_MODE=mainnet concurrently "node x402/server.js" "node demo/mcp/dashboard.js"
